TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_James_Augustine, title = James_Augustine, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Augustine} }

S.FORM: James Augustine hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, James Augustine, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

James Augustine hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, James Augustine, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ames~ɕ auɣus~ɕtine ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ames~ɕ auɣus~ɕtine, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
